parameters.query:
SELECT
    i.applicability_group AS group_code,
    i.applicability_question,
    i.section,
    MIN(i.sort_order) AS sort_order,
    MAX(r.is_applicable) AS current_response
FROM ref.tax_checklist_items i
JOIN ref.tax_checklist_responses r
    ON r.item_id = i.item_id AND r.fy_year = {{ $json.fy_year }}
WHERE i.item_type = 'DOCUMENT'
  AND i.always_required = false
  AND i.applicability_group IS NOT NULL
  AND i.active = true
GROUP BY i.applicability_group, i.applicability_question, i.section
ORDER BY MIN(i.sort_order);
